improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your AI-powered trade and business assistant. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for operations and trade. Try three free searches today."><meta property="og:title" content="Gideon | AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta property="og:description" content="Your Claude-powered assistant for trade and business. Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access for members."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:image" content="https://gdn.ai/og-image.png"><meta property="og:url" content="https://gdn.ai/"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image"><meta name="twitter:title" content="Gideon | AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta name="twitter:description" content="Claude-powered AI assistant for business owners, traders, and professionals. Try three free searches.">
improvements.rationale: A clear meta description improves click-through rates from search results by communicating the core value proposition and free trial offer. Open Graph and Twitter Card tags ensure professional, branded previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, or Twitter, which builds trust and increases referral traffic. These tags are foundational for SEO and social visibility.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for your business operations. Try three free searches — no card required."
improvements.rationale: This copy immediately introduces the product name and its core function, establishes credibility by highlighting key features (instant answers, voice chat, professional support), and creates a low-friction entry point by emphasizing the free trial with no payment commitment. The structure moves from brand introduction to value props to clear CTA trigger.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches, you'll be invited to become a member to continue accessing Gideon. Membership starts at just US$2 per day, billed monthly—or save 30% with an annual plan. As a member, you unlock unlimited searches, voice chat, and a dedicated workspace built for trade and business professionals.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the conversion moment when free users hit the paywall. It transparently explains what happens next, reinforces the low entry price, highlights the annual savings incentive, and reminds prospects of the full member benefits—reducing friction and building trust at a critical decision point.
